lobby2.en: If you can win me over on the Mahjong table, I will give you a little surprise.

login_normal.en: Welcome back~ What are you going to do today?

obtained.en: I am Miki Nikaido. Glad to meet you~

gift_normal.en: Thank you! I will take good care of it~

gift_preferred.en: As long as it's from you, I love it.
